popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  Sire de Coucy, Marle and le Fere, 1131-1147.  Crusader; died somewhere in the East on the 2nd Crusade.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/CHAMPAGNE%20NOBILITY.htm#EnguerrandIICoucyB as of …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Enguerrand de Coucy於1108年11月10日出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可時，他的父親Thomas de Marle-Coucy35歲，母親Mélisende de Crécy25歲。他於1132年7月9日與Agnès de Beaugency結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1148年3月16日享年39歲，埋葬在以色列מחוז הצפוןנָצְרַת。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Enguerrand de Coucy于1108年11月10日出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可时，他的父亲Thomas de Marle-Coucy35岁，母亲Mélisende de Crécy25岁。他于1132年7月9日与Agnès de Beaugency结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1148年3月16日享年39岁，埋葬在以色列מחוז הצפוןנָצְרַת。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Arabic   Khoury   or   Khouri   ‘priest’. Compare   Courey  ,   Couri  , and   Cury  .
French: habitational name from a place so named in Vienne.

variants.name: Khoury
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Nabil, Sami, Samir, Issa, Ibrahim, Ramzi, Bassam, Fouad, Habib, Issam, Jamil, Riad.  French Michel, Antoine, Emile, Pierre, Andre, Camille, Clemence, Clovis, Georges, Gisele, Henri, Jacques.

Arabic (mainly Lebanon, Syria, and Jordan): from khūrī ‘priest’, in particular a Christian priest. This surname is used among Christians, including Assyrians/Chaldeans. Compare Cory , Coury , Cury , Elkhoury , Khouri , Kory , Koury , and Kury .

en.lifeSummary: When Enguerrand de Coucy was born on 10 November 1108, in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Thomas de Marle-Coucy, was 35 and his mother, Mélisende de Crécy, was 25. He married Agnès de Beaugency on 9 July 1132. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 16 March 1148, at the age of 39, and was buried in Nazareth, Northern, Israel.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Enguerrand de Coucy est né le 10 novembre 1108, à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Thomas de Marle-Coucy, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mélisende de Crécy, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de Beaugency le 9 juillet 1132. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 16 mars 1148, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Nazareth, Northern, Israël.

de.lifeSummary: Als Enguerrand de Coucy am 10. November 1108 in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Marle-Coucy 35 und seine Mutter Mélisende de Crécy 25. Er hat am 9. Juli 1132 Agnès de Beaugency geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 16. März 1148 im Alter von 39 Jahren und wurde in Nazareth, Northern, Israel begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Enguerrand de Coucy è nato il il 10 novembre 1108 nel Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Thomas de Marle-Coucy, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mélisende de Crécy, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de Beaugency il 9 luglio 1132. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 16 marzo 1148, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Nazareth, Northern, Israele.

ja.lifeSummary: Enguerrand de Coucyが1108年11月10日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリクで生まれた時，父Thomas de Marle-Coucyは35歳，母Mélisende de Crécyは25歳であった。1132年7月9日にAgnès de Beaugencyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1148年3月16日に39歳で死去し，イスラエルמחוז הצפוןנָצְרַתにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Enguerrand de Coucy(이)가 1108년 11월 10일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Marle-Coucy(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mélisende de Crécy(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1132년 7월 9일 Agnès de Beaugency(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1148년 3월 16일 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון נָצְרַת에 묻혔다.

mn.10 November 1108–16 March 1148: 1108 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 10–1148 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 16

pt.10 November 1108–16 March 1148: 10 de novembro de 1108–16 de março de 1148
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Enguerrand de Coucy nasceu em 10 de novembro de 1108, em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Thomas de Marle-Coucy, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mélisende de Crécy, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de Beaugency em 9 de julho de 1132. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 16 de março de 1148, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Nazareth, Northern, Israel.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Enguerrand de Coucy родился 10 ноября 1108 г. в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Thomas de Marle-Coucy было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mélisende de Crécy, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de Beaugency 9 июля 1132 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 16 марта 1148 г. в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности נָצְרַת, מחוז הצפון, Израиль.

es.10 November 1108–16 March 1148: 10 de noviembre de 1108–16 de marzo de 1148
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Enguerrand de Coucy nació el 10 de noviembre de 1108, en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Thomas de Marle-Coucy, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mélisende de Crécy, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Agnès de Beaugency el 9 de julio de 1132. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1148, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Nazareth, Northern, Israel.
